tagline: Tests IT general controls and drafts workpapers — a licensed CPA signs the opinion.
problem: SOX ITGC testing is the most repetitive part of assurance — access reviews, change evidence, control execution — yet only a licensed CPA may issue the ICFR opinion.
outcome: Controls tested and exceptions severity-rated straight-through; the engagement partner signs the ICFR opinion before it is issued.

steps.does: Scope the in-scope ITGCs and pull the access, change and operations evidence
Execute the ITGC control tests and flag exceptions
Rate exception severity (deficiency / significant / material weakness); check independence and materiality
A licensed CPA / engagement partner signs the opinion
Issue the signed workpapers and the ICFR opinion
Track remediation of deficiencies and roll forward
